title: ◦ Channeler, Builder, Bondmaker, Mutator
content:
◦ Channeler, Builder, Bondmaker, Mutator
2 Prompt Design: Each channel can be its own AI prompt shell
3 Time Block Matching: Assign creative windows that correspond to each channel
4 Output Flagging: Tag which channel a project was born from (e.g., “3–60: Mutation”)
🧭 NEXT SECTION OPTIONS
Choose one to continue:
• ➡️ [SECTION 02]: Gates + Line Analysis
• ➡️ [SECTION 03]: Incarnation Cross (your mythic “theme”)
• ➡️ [SECTION 04]: Authority Mechanics (Emotional Authority in action)
• ➡️ [SECTION 05]: Profile Deep Dive (3/2 = Martyr/Hermit)
• ➡️ [SECTION 06]: System Mapping / Character Templates
Reply with your next target.
2
Excellent—continuing to [SECTION 02] – Gate & Line Analysis.   This is where Human Design gets fractal: your gates are the specific frequencies that shape how your defined channels express, and lines add nuance—like mythic traits or mutations within the signal.
🔍 [SECTION 02] — 🧬 GATES & LINES (with Archetypal Mapping)
We’ll decode:
• Conscious (Personality) gates – “what you are aware of”
